items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "Mrc Supercomputer Networking".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=Unlocking large scale AI training networks with MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection) link=https://openai.com/index/mrc-supercomputer-networking description=OpenAI introduces MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a new supercomputer networking protocol released via OCP to improve resilience and performance in large-scale AI training clusters. title=GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized published=Tue, 05 May 2026 10:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-5-instant description=GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls. title=What is Codex? link=https://openai.com/academy/what-is-codex description=Learn how Codex helps you go beyond chat by automating tasks,...
